title: Reducing the number of digits in a ITEM ID Column
excerpt:
Good day - i want to submit a feature request to reduce the number of digits on a Item ID column. There are currently 10 digits and we only need about 3 to match the filing system.

posts.author: RyanM1 (Ryan Marais )
posts.cookedHtml:
Good day - i want to submit a feature request to reduce the number of digits on a Item ID column. There are currently 10 digits and we only need about 3 to match the filing system.
Would it be possible to consider having a feature like this>
